command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalProducts,
       SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NULL OR sheetRowNumber <= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missingSheetRowNumber,
       SUM(CASE WHEN batchNo IN ('01400003031','01400003032','01400003033','01400003034','01400003035','01400003036','01400003037','01400003038','01400003039','01400003040','01400003041','01400003042','01400003043','01400003044','01400003045','01400003046','01400003047','01400003048') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS affectedBatchRows
FROM products
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01';
